title: Psychology in Action
description: Dr. Robert Hartley discusses diagnosis, research, and practice with a panel of expert psychologists.
quote: What friction? I don’t know what you’re talking about. My father is a beautiful human being. I love my father.
alt1: Hartley in a chair circle with five guests
alt2: two women: one brunette and an older one knitting
alt3: Hartley speaks with a man with glasses
alt4: another male guest looks at the camera
